 |:------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|:-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|:-----------|:-------------------------|:------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `Sessions`                                                                                | `array`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | &#10006    |                          | List of all sessions to run. Sessions contain the actions performed against the tested system and its underlying infrastructure in order to receive response data from the tested system to assert on.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `Sessions[]`                                                                              | `object`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | &#10006    |                          |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `Sessions[].Name`                                                                         | `string`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | &#10004    |                          | The name of the session, used to uniquely identify it and its output                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `Sessions[].TimeoutAfterSessionMs`                                                        | `integer` (`0.0` <= `value` <= `4294967295.0`)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | &#10006    | 0                        | The time in milliseconds to wait after the session ends                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `Sessions[].TimeoutBeforeSessionMs`                                                       | `integer` (`0.0` <= `value` <= `4294967295.0`)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | &#10006    | 0                        | The time in milliseconds to wait before the session starts                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `Sessions[].SaveData`                                                                     | `boolean`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | &#10006    | True                     | Whether or not to save the session's output, if false any data is discarded after its iterated over and the SessionData as a whole is not saved.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `Sessions[].Category`                                                                     | `string`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | &#10006    |                          | The category of the session, you can filter which categories to run using the -I flag | `Sessions[].Stage`                                                                        | `integer`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | &#10006    |                          | The stage of the session. Sessions with the same stage runs together. stage defaultly gets the index of the session in session list Null means no deserialization will happen. | `Sessions[].MockerCommands[].Redis.ConnectRetry`                                          | `integer` connect | `Sessions[].MockerCommands[].Redis.AbortOnConnectFail`                                    | `boolean`                                                                                              | &#10006    | True                     | If true, connect will not create connection while no servers are available | `Sessions[].Collectors`                                                                   | `array`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | &#10006    |                          | List of all collectors to build and run for this session. | `Sessions[].Collectors[].Name`                                                            | `string`                                                                                              | &#10004    |                          | The name of the collector                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `Sessions[].Collectors[].EndTimeReachedCheckIntervalMs`                                   | `integer` (`0.0` <= `value` <= `4294967295.0`)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | &#10006    | 1000                     | The check interval in milliseconds of the check that the current UTC time is past the collection end time, so the collection action can happen.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `Sessions[].Collectors[].Prometheus`                                                      | `object`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | &#10006    |                          | Collects messages from the prometheus `query_range` API and saves each of them as an item of a vector result's array. vector is a result type in prometheus that represents a set of time series data, every item of its result array represents a single value at a certain time.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `Sessions[].Collectors[].Prometheus.Expression`                                           | `string`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | &#10004    |                          | The expression to query the prometheus query_range API with to collect data                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `Sessions[].Collectors[].Prometheus.Url`                                                  | `string`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | &#10004    |                          | The prometheus' url, the base url without any route | `Sessions[].Collectors[].Prometheus.ApiKey`                                               | `string`                                                                                              | &#10006    |                          | The api key for interacting with prometheus | `Sessions[].Collectors[].Prometheus.TimeoutMs`                                            | `integer` (`1.0` <= `value` <= `4294967295.0`)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | &#10006    | 120000                   | The timeout in milliseconds for the execution of the query sent to the prometheus API                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `Sessions[].Collectors[].Prometheus.SampleIntervalMs`                                     | `integer` (`1.0` <= `value` <= `4294967295.0`)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | &#10006    | 30000                    | The interval to sample the expression's value from the prometheus during the collection time range in milliseconds                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `Sessions[].Collectors[].CollectionRange`                                                 | `object`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | &#10006    |                          | The collection range of the collector's action contains parameters for the start and end times of the collection range in relation to the start and end time of the collector's session. | `Sessions[].Collectors[].CollectionRange.EndTimeMs`                                       | `integer` (`-2147483648.0` <= `value` <= `2147483647.0`)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | &#10006    | 0                        | The end time of the collection range in relation to the session end time, given in milliseconds, is added to the session's start time as is to determine the collection end time.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | &#10006    | 0                        | The start time of the collection range in relation to the session start time, given in milliseconds, is added to the session's start time as is to determine the collection start time.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | &#10004    |                          | the consumption timeout in milliseconds (timeout is the time to wait for a response after sending a request)                                                                                              | &#10004    |                          | The communication action's name which acts as a unique identifier, used as the name of the communication action's produced input/output                                                                                                                                           |

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | &#10006    |                          | This policy executes actions in separate stages, each stage has a rate in which to execute the actions included in it and a count or timeout to know after how many actions or after how much time to end the stage and move to the next.                                                                                              | &#10004    |                          | The stages of publishing information, in each stage the messages will be publishedwith a given rate untill 'Amount' messages are generated or untill 'TimeoutMs' is reached | `Sessions[].Transactions[].Http.Port`                                                     | `integer` (`0.0` <= `value` <= `65535.0`)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | &#10006    | 8080                     | The port to send the requests to in the http server                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `Sessions[].Transactions[].Http.JwtAuth`                                                  | `object`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | &#10006    |                          | The JWT configurations for the generation and addition of a JWT as a Bearer authorization header, if this field is not configured will not use JwtAuth | `Sessions[].Transactions[].Http.JwtAuth.Secret`                                           | `string`                                                                                                                                           |
| `Sessions[].Transactions[].Http.JwtAuth.BuildJwtConfig`                                   | `boolean`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | &#10006    | True                     | Whether to build JWT config with claims or send the Secret value as the auth token                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `Sessions[].Transactions[].Http.JwtAuth.HttpAuthScheme`                                   | `enum` [`Bearer` / `Basic` / `Digest` / `JWT` / `ApiKey` / `Token`]                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | &#10006    | Bearer                   | The authorization scheme to use                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `Sessions[].Transactions[].Http.JwtAuth.JwtAlgorithm`                                     | `enum` [`HMACSHA256Algorithm`]                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | &#10006    | HMACSHA256Algorithm      | The JWT Algorithm algorithm used                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `Sessions[].Transactions[].Http.JwtAuth.HierarchicalClaims`                               | `string`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | &#10006    |                          | Custom Hierarchical claims of the JWT, Must be a string in yaml format. When set to a non null value the Claims field will be ignored and this will be used instead.                                                                                                                                     |
| `Sessions[].Transactions[].Http.JwtAuth.Claims`                                           | `object`                                                                                              | &#10006    |                          | Custom claims of the JWT                                                                                                                                           |
| `Sessions[].Transactions[].Http.RequestHeaders`                                           | `object`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | &#10006    |                          | Default request headers to add to the http requests, will be overriden if sent data has http request headers in its metadata | `Sessions[].Transactions[].Http.Headers`                                                  | `object`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | &#10006    |                          | Default content headers to add to the http requests, will be overriden if sent data has http content headers in its metadata                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `Sessions[].Transactions[].OutputDeserialize`                                             | `object`                                                                                              | &#10006    |                          | The deserializer to use to deserialize the received data Null means no deserialization will happen. Options are all available `QaaS.Framework.Serialization` deserializers                                                                                              | &#10006    |                          | Configuration for making deserializer deserialize into a specific C# object, if set to null will deserialize to default deserilizer's C# object                                                                                              | &#10004    |                          | The full name (including path) of the type                                                                                              | &#10006    |                          | The name of the assembly the type is located in, If no value is given by default tries to take the entry assembly | `Sessions[].Publishers[].SleepTimeMs`                                                     | `integer` (`0.0` <= `value` <= `1.84467440737096e+19`)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | &#10006    | 0                        | The time to sleep in milliseconds in between iterations                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |

                                                                                             | &#10006    | False                    | Whether to publish in loop                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | &#10006    | 1                        | How much iterations of the publishing action to execute
